title: Issue #780 native desktop notifications: Execution
description: Derived from linked plan "issue-780-native-desktop-notifications" for PREVC phase E (Execution). Plan phases: Execution. Phase objectives: Implement settings, pure derivation, Electron delivery, navigation, and focused tests.. Key steps: Add default-off persisted desktop preference; Add pure settled transition derivation and replay-safe observation; Add native Electron delivery and focus policy; Add click restore, focus, and pending deep-link navigation. Expected outputs: Production code, Focused automated tests, Settings schema and UI, Tracker and tests, Desktop service and tests, IPC and renderer integration.
acceptanceCriteria: Add pure settled transition derivation and replay-safe observation
Add native Electron delivery and focus policy
Add click restore, focus, and pending deep-link navigation

planPhaseSummaries: Implement settings, pure derivation, Electron delivery, navigation, and focused tests.
